ABS8 X90 V1.7

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 01
Func Name: ABS

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "28",
    "supplier": "037",
    "soft": "EF9E",
    "version": "0101"
  },
  {
    "diagversion": "28",
    "supplier": "037",
    "soft": "FCB0",
    "version": "0101"
  }
]

    "name": "Capteur pédale de frein"
  }
]

Requests

[
  {
    "minbytes": 8,
    "sentbytes": "21B0",
    "name": "RDBLI_Dates",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Année APV": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "Année ECU": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Jour APV": {
        "firstbyte": 8
      },
      "Jour ECU": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      },
      "Mois APV": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "Mois ECU": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 26,
    "sentbytes": "2180",
    "name": "RDBLI_Identification",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Année": {
        "firstbyte": 13
      },
      "Code APV": {
        "firstbyte": 8
      },
      "Code ITG": {
        "firstbyte": 9
      },
      "Code MPR": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Equipe": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "Jour": {
        "firstbyte": 15
      },
      "Ligne": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "N° pièce": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "Numéro soft AS": {
        "firstbyte": 17
      },
      "Numéro soft SS": {
        "firstbyte": 23
      },
      "Semaine": {
        "firstbyte": 12
      },
      "Usine": {
        "firstbyte": 14
      },
      "Version soft AS": {
        "firstbyte": 19
      },
      "Version soft SS": {
        "firstbyte": 25
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "sentbytes": "21E0",
    "name": "RDBLI_Process_byte",
    "deny_sds": [],

      }
    }
  },

    "sentbytes": "21C0",

    "deny_sds": [],

        "bitoffset": 1

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },

        "firstbyte": 2
      },

        "firstbyte": 5
      },

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
